NAVAREA XIX 26/22
 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT　 121830 UTC MAR 22
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.


 72-29.2N 020-20.5E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 65-23.0N 007-22.0E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
 65-31.0N 007-29.5E TRANSOCEAN NORGE
 65-21.8N 007-20.0E ISLAND WELLSERVER


 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　22/22
